title: S'Shah

{{Quote|The natives—Serps, such as the one pictured here—are generally sympathetic to the Rebellion. But their current monarch, King S'Shah, is a tyrant who rules with an iron hand—and definite Imperial leanings!|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="marvel64" />}}
[[King/Legends|King]] '''S'Shah''' was the ruler of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Serphidi/Legends|Serphidi]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. An [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-aligned tyrant, S'Shah bucked [[Serp]] tradition by circumventing ancient bans upon technology, and turning their yearly jousting competitions into bloodsport. However, S'Shah lost his crown in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], when [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], acting on the behalf of rival challenger [[Elglih]], defeated S'Shah in one of these [[Doom-Joust/Legends|Doom-Jousts]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Well done, hu-man! There is fire beneath your pallid flesh! I like that! And once the tournament is done, that fire shall be mine! As will be—though with perhaps a pinch of salt—that flesh!|S'Shah, to Cinda Tarheel|<ref name="marvel64" />}}
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Serp]] [[Species/Legends|species]], S'Shah reigned as [[King/Legends|King]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Serphidi/Legends|Serphidi]] during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. S'Shah took the throne on a world that had previously been devastated by generations of war, which had been brought to an end by the unity of all Serps under a single king, the banning of technology, and the outlet of the Serps' violent impulses into yearly jousting contests. As king, S'Shah went against tradition by reintroducing some forbidden technology and integrating into the jousts, turning them into deadly "[[Doom-Joust/Legends|Doom-Jousts]]" that were proclaimed as the only legitimate way for S'Shah to be deposed as King. And while popular sentiment among most Serps was friendly towards the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], King S'Shah—who was seen by many as a ruthless tyrant—aligned himself to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], prompting the Rebels to send several operatives to Serphidi in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] to overthrow S'Shah and secure the planet's support<ref name="marvel64" />

Their landing went poorly, with one [[Berl (Alliance)|Rebel pilot]] [[Death/Legends|killed]] and another, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Cinda Tarheel/Legends|Cinda Tarheel]], taken back to S'Shah as a [[Prison/Legends|prisoner]]. S'Shah planned on eating Tarheel after the yearly Doom-Joust, where he was challenged for the throne by an elderly Serp named [[Elglih]] Claiming injury, Elglih had his squire, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]—another of the Rebel pilots who had traveled to Serphidi—stand in his place for the joust. An amused S'Shah allowed Skywalker to compete after realizing that he and Tarheel knew one another, but was defeated in single combat. S'Shah feigned surrender and attempted to attack Skywalker from behind with a [[micro-jolt]], but the Human sensed his betrayal and killed S'Shah with his [[Energy lance/Legends|energy lance]].<ref name="marvel64" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Why should I, a Serp, possibly wish to join myself to one with such pale, flimsy features? Why, I doubt you've even a single scale on your body! No, when I spoke of sating my appetite, I meant precisely that—the quenching of my exceedingly refined palate. I'm quite a gourmet, you know.|S'Shah, to Cinda Tarheel|<ref name="marvel64" />}}
A autocratic king, S'Shah ruled Serphidi with an iron fist, using the threat of violence to keep his people in line and ensure he held onto his throne. S'Shah backed up these sentiments as a particularly skilled jouster and combatant, one quite confident in his abilities. S'Shah considered himself a gourmet with a refined palate, and enjoyed eating [[Human/Legends|Humans]] as a particular delicacy.<ref name="marvel64" />

==Behind the scenes==
S'Shah appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 64|''Star Wars'' (1977) 64]], written by [[David Michelinie]] and [[Michael Fleisher]], illustrated by [[Joe Brozowski]] and released in [[1982]].<ref name="marvel64" />
